{{Infobox artifact
| name = Imperial seal
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial seal]] is a famous relic used by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to imprint messages.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Messages sent with the [[Imperial seal]] cannot be opened or read by anyone other than the intended recipient.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperial seal]] is not [[Awakened]] but possesses heavy significance of [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
